creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 233090
Screenshot: OmniOS community edition boot loader

Please consider enhancing FreeBSD boot loader menu option 8 (boot environments) to present: 

* a list of available environments. 

Compare with, for example, the 2017 screenshot of OmniOS CE (attached, from <https://omnios.org/assets/images/BootEnv.png>). 

If possible, please sort the list by date of creation. 

Thanks
